item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya tidak setuju dengan argumen mereka bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus mendahului hak individu.

notes: Agent A opens with clear support for society-first priority, shifts at turn 3 toward a rights-protective balance position, then partially returns at turn 5 to Indonesian collective and social-justice framing. Agent B begins rights-first, softens toward balance and social justice by turn 4, but still ends by defending individual freedom as central to democracy. Both agents move toward the middle rather than one clearly absorbing the other.
